hero.title: Start Your Australian Education
hero.subtitle: With our physical office in Brisbane, we support you every step of your Australian education journey. From choosing the right school to settling in — we're right here with you.

featuredSchools.title: Featured
featuredSchools.subtitle: Discover Australia's most prestigious and highly-ranked universities, handpicked for international students seeking academic excellence.

aboutSummary.title: Your Local Partner in Australia
aboutSummary.description: EduBrisbane is not just a remote consultancy. With our physical office in Albion, Brisbane, we provide on-ground, face-to-face support. From airport pickup to finding accommodation and setting up your bank account, we are with you every step of the way.

services.title: Plan Your Education Journey
services.subtitle: We guide you in finding the education program that best suits your needs.

elicos.title: Language Schools (ELICOS)
elicos.description: Learn English at Australia's top language schools. A wide range of programs from General English to IELTS preparation.

vet.title: Vocational Education (VET)
vet.description: Prepare for the business world with career-focused vocational training programs in Australia. Practical training supported by internship opportunities.

university.title: University Pathways
university.description: We guide you on paths to Australia's prestigious universities. From foundation programs to postgraduate education.

localAdvantage.title: On the Ground in
localAdvantage.subtitle: Not remote consulting — face-to-face support at our Albion, Brisbane office. We're with you from the moment you arrive in Australia.

arrival.title: Airport Pickup
arrival.description: We meet you at Brisbane Airport, standing by your side from day one.

accommodation.title: Accommodation Support
accommodation.description: We help you find safe and affordable accommodation options.

banking.title: Bank & Phone Setup
banking.description: We take care of first-day essentials like opening a bank account and getting a phone plan.

ongoing.title: Ongoing Support
ongoing.description: We provide academic and personal support throughout your education journey.

form.title: Start Your Journey

levels.beginner: Beginner - No or very little knowledge
levels.elementary: Elementary - I can understand simple sentences
levels.intermediate: Intermediate - I can hold everyday conversations
levels.advanced: Advanced - I can communicate at an academic level

form.success: Your application has been received! We'll get in touch with you shortly.

errors.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address

footer.description: Education consultancy agency based in Albion, Brisbane. We turn your dream of studying in Australia into reality.
footer.disclaimer: EduBrisbane works in solution partnership with Australian education institutions through accredited platforms.

languageSchools.title: Language Schools (ELICOS)
languageSchools.subtitle: Discover top English language schools in Australia to advance your career or prepare for further studies.
languageSchools.intro: Studying English in Australia isn't just about language proficiency; it's about cultural immersion. Our ELICOS partners provide engaging, interactive environments where you'll rapidly improve your fluency while building a global network of friends. Whether you need General English, IELTS preparation, or want to master Barista English, we've got you covered.

tafe.title: TAFE & Vocational Colleges
tafe.subtitle: Gain practical, career-focused skills through our partner vocational institutions and TAFE colleges.
tafe.intro: Australia's VET (Vocational Education and Training) sector is world-renowned for its hands-on, industry-aligned approach. TAFE and private colleges equip you with the exact technical skills employers demand right now. From Commercial Cookery and Automotive Technology to IT and Nursing, these pathways focus on building real-world competence.

universities.title: Universities Directory
universities.subtitle: Explore world-class undergraduate and postgraduate programs at Australia's leading universities.
universities.intro: A degree from an Australian university is prestigious and recognized globally. Our comprehensive directory features world-renowned research institutions, including the elite Group of Eight, as well as innovative, top-tier modern universities. Browse our catalog below to identify the campus environment, rankings, and academic focus that best match your ambitions.

workingRights.title: Working Rights in Australia (ESOS)
workingRights.description: International students on a student visa can work up to 48 hours per fortnight while their course is in session, and unlimited hours during recognized school holidays.

metadata.title: EduBrisbane | Australian Education Consultancy
metadata.description: Australian education consultancy for students, based in Albion, Brisbane. Language schools, vocational education, and university pathways.

lsMetadata.title: Language Schools in Australia | EduBrisbane
lsMetadata.description: Find the best English language schools (ELICOS) in Australia with EduBrisbane.

tafeMetadata.title: TAFE & Colleges in Australia | EduBrisbane
tafeMetadata.description: Explore practical VET courses and TAFE colleges in Australia.

uniMetadata.title: Universities in Australia | EduBrisbane
uniMetadata.description: Start your university journey in Australia with expert guidance from EduBrisbane.

aboutMetadata.title: About Us | EduBrisbane
aboutMetadata.description: Learn more about EduBrisbane's physical presence in Albion, Brisbane and how our local advantage benefits your Australian education journey.

contactMetadata.title: Contact Us | EduBrisbane
contactMetadata.description: Get in touch with the EduBrisbane team to start your Australian education journey today. Fill out our simple application form.

hero.title: Empowering Your
hero.subtitle: Comprehensive guidance for every step of your Australian journey. Explore our tailored services.

elicos.heading: Master English with ELICOS
elicos.description: Whether you need to improve your general conversation skills, prepare for the IELTS/PTE exams, or meet the entry requirements for a university degree, our partner Language Schools provide the perfect immersive environment. We handpick schools in Brisbane and across Australia that offer dynamic teaching methods and strong international student support.

vet.heading: Hands-on Skills with VET & TAFE
vet.description: Vocational Education and Training (VET) offers practical, career-focused learning. Programs at TAFE and private colleges are designed alongside industry experts to ensure you graduate with in-demand skills. Popular pathways include Commercial Cookery, Information Technology, Healthcare, and Automotive Trades.

university.heading: World-Class University Degrees
university.description: Australia is home to some of the world's highest-ranking universities. We guide you through the complex application process for Foundation, Bachelor's, and Master's programs. We assist with course selection, scholarship applications, and ensuring your admissions portfolio stands out.

guides.title: Knowledge Hub
guides.subtitle: Essential guides and expert advice for international students planning their Australian education journey.

consultationCTA.title: Need Personalized Advice?
consultationCTA.subtitle: Our Brisbane-based experts are ready to help you plan your education journey.

leadMagnet.title: Free Australian Student Visa Checklist
leadMagnet.subtitle: Download our comprehensive step-by-step PDF checklist to ensure your visa application is flawless.
leadMagnet.spamNote: We respect your privacy. No spam.

visaChecker.title: Visa Success
visaChecker.subtitle: Estimate your Australia Student Visa (Subclass 500) profile strength based on the latest Genuine Student (GS) requirements in 4 quick steps.

questions.englishTitle: What is your current English proficiency level?
questions.englishDesc: Valid IELTS, PTE, or TOEFL scores are critical for demonstrating genuine intent.

high.label: Advanced (IELTS 6.5+ / PTE 58+)
high.desc: Strong proof of ability to study.

low.label: Beginner / No Test Yet
low.desc: Will likely require an ELICOS package.

questions.gpaTitle: What is your recent academic performance (GPA)?
questions.gpaDesc: A strong academic background supports your Genuine Student (GS) assessment.

low.label: Low (Below 2.0 / <60%)
low.desc: May need further explanation in GS.

questions.financialDesc: You must prove you can cover 12 months of living costs, travel, and tuition.

partial.label: Partially Ready
partial.desc: Securing loan or waiting for sponsor.

questions.institutionTitle: What type of institution are you aiming for?
questions.institutionDesc: The Assessment Level (AL) of your provider impacts the documentary evidence required.

results.title: Your Visa Profile Strength
results.analyzing: Analyzing your responses based on current DHA guidelines...

highScore.title: Strong Profile!
highScore.desc: Your profile looks excellent. You have a very high chance of meeting the Genuine Student requirements. Let's fast-track your university application.

mediumScore.title: Good Profile with Room for Improvement
mediumScore.desc: Your profile is solid but taking a few strategic steps will drastically increase your visa safety.

lowScore.title: High Risk Profile - Immediate Action Required
lowScore.desc: Your profile currently carries a very high risk of visa refusal under the new GS rules. Please do not apply without professional restructuring. Our expert agents can help mitigate these risks.

warnings.englishLow: We strongly recommend considering a packaged ELICOS (English) course to boost your proficiency and GS profile.
warnings.gpaLow: A thoughtful GS statement will be needed to explain your academic history.
warnings.financialNeed: Securing your financial capacity is the most critical next step. Let our agents guide you on acceptable evidence.
warnings.al3Risk: Applying to an AL3 institution requires maximum documentary evidence. We can help you build a robust portfolio or suggest AL1/AL2 alternatives.

leadCapture.label: Get Fast-Tracked Advice via WhatsApp
leadCapture.prompt: Great profile! Our Albion team is reviewing your data. Want to start a live consultation now?

cta.help: Discuss your personalized strategy with our AI Visa Assistant.

results.disclaimer: Disclaimer: This tool provides an estimate based on current DHA guidelines. It is not a guarantee of visa approval. Final decisions rest solely with the Australian Department of Home Affairs.

servicesMetadata.title: Our Services | EduBrisbane

about.title: Your Education Journey,
about.subtitle: We believe international education is more than just academic—it's about successfully integrating into a new country. That's why we maintain a permanent physical presence in Brisbane.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: To be the most reliable, on-ground partner for students choosing Australia for their education, ensuring no student feels alone from the moment they land until they graduate.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: Providing transparent, objective guidance tailored to each student's goals, whilst maintaining a strong local support network that extends beyond enrollment to real-life settlement.

compare.title: Compare Schools
compare.subtitle: Discover the best institution for your goals by comparing fees, rankings, and exclusive local insights.
compare.emptyState: You haven't selected any schools to compare yet. Browse our catalogs to add up to 3 schools.

budgetPlanner.title: Brisbane Cost of Living Calculator
budgetPlanner.subtitle: Estimate your weekly and monthly expenses in Brisbane based on current 2026 data. Keep in mind that lifestyle choices drastically impact your budget.

shared.label: Shared Apartment or Room
shared.desc: Renting a room in a shared house/apartment. ~$250-350/week.

solo.label: Solo 1-Bed Apartment (Albion/City)
solo.desc: Living alone in a central location. ~$450-600/week.

cook.label: I mostly cook my meals
cook.desc: Grocery shopping at Coles/Woolworths or local markets. ~$100-130/week.

eatOut.label: I eat out frequently
eatOut.desc: Combining groceries with frequent dining at cafes & restaurants. ~$200-250/week.

gocard.label: Translink GoCard (Public Transport)
gocard.desc: Student concession or standard public transport usage. ~$30-50/week.

bike.label: Bicycle / Walking
bike.desc: Living close to campus or cycling. $0/week (after initial bike purchase).

comparison.title: Government Requirement Comparison
comparison.desc: The Australian Government requires international students to demonstrate access to $31,000 AUD per year (~$2,583 per month) for living costs.
comparison.underBudget: Your estimated lifestyle is below the government's minimum. You'll likely need to show $31,000 AUD minimum regardless.
comparison.overBudget: Your lifestyle choices exceed the government minimum requirement. Ensure you have the financial capacity to support this.

cta.title: On a tight budget?
cta.desc: Brisbane is affordable, but finding the right school makes a huge difference. Talk to Serter about high-quality, cost-effective TAFE and VET options to optimize your budget.
cta.whatsappText: Hi Serter! I just calculated my living costs on your website and I'm looking for affordable courses in Brisbane.

pathwayPlanner.title: Education Pathway Visualizer
pathwayPlanner.subtitle: Discover your step-by-step journey from your current situation to an Australian professional career. Select your profile below to generate your custom roadmap.

cta.whatsappText: Hi Serter! I just generated my education pathway on your website and would like to discuss the application process.

leadModal.title: Get Your Free Custom Roadmap
leadModal.subtitle: Enter your details below, and we'll instantly generate your custom PDF including an exclusive guide on our 'On-ground Support' in Brisbane.
leadModal.name: Full Name
leadModal.successDesc: Your custom pathway and our local support guide have been emailed to you.

pdf.supportSubtitle: Your Partner From Landing to Graduation
pdf.supportText1: Arriving safely is just the beginning. At EduBrisbane, we believe international education is a complete lifestyle transition.
pdf.supportText2: Our Albion HQ is your local checkpoint. We assist with accommodation, TFN setup, bank accounts, and localized job seeking.
pdf.supportText3: Never feel alone with 24/7 emergency support and a community of successful international students.

compliance.legalWarningBackhopping: ⚠️ Under the March 2026 regulations, transitioning from a Subclass 485 Temporary Graduate Visa down to a lower-level Vocational (VET/TAFE) qualification carries a critically high risk of visa refusal.
compliance.action: Please select a higher education pathway (e.g., Master's Degree) to proceed, or consult with Serter for alternative options.
